Persian Pixel: A large-scale synthetic OCR dataset for Persian language
docs.text:
• 作者：Pouria Mahdi, Haq Nawaz Malik
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.20385v1

Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for Persian remains substantially less mature than for Latin-script languages despite Persian being spoken by more than 110 million people across multiple countries.

docs.title: ERank in Latent Space as an Image-Complexity and Richness Measure
docs.text:
• 作者：Maksim Smirnov, Grigory Kononov, Anastasiia Linich, Egor Surkov, Egor Shvetsov
  • 提交：2026-07-21 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.19315v1

We propose the effective rank (ERank) of the channel covariance of an image's deep feature map as a per-sample, label-free measure of visual richness, computed from a single forward pass through a frozen pretrained encoder.

docs.title: Think Sparse, Predict Dense: Continuous Thought Machines for Image Super-Resolution
docs.text:
• 作者：Zekai Shi
  • 提交：2026-07-21 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.18856v1

Continuous Thought Machines introduce an internal temporal dimension in which neuron-level histories and synchronization-derived representations evolve over a sequence of thought ticks.

docs.title: 大语言模型
LKValues: Aligning Large Language Models with Sri Lankan Societal Values
docs.text:
• 作者：Nethmi Muthugala, Supryadi, Surangika Ranathunga, Nisansa de Silva, Ruijie Tao 等 10 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.20410v1

Value alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) has been shown to be culturally biased toward Western norms. This results in the mishandling of local values in multilingual societies such as Sri Lanka that have their unique cultural dynamics.

docs.title: Notes to Self: Can LLMs Benefit from Experiential Abstractions?
docs.text:
• 作者：Chang Liu, Xinyu Li, Artur Dubrawski
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.20372v1

Humans distill experience into reusable abstractions, e.g., strategies and cautionary reminders, and apply them to gradually solve problems more effectively. We study whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can similarly benefit from such experiential abstractions.

docs.title: PyroDash: Cost-Efficient Token-Level Small-Large Language Model Collaborative Inference
docs.text:
• 作者：Niqi Lyu, Pengtao Shi, Wei Qiu, Jianlin Zhong, Sicong Xia 等 7 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.20327v1

Large language models (LLMs) provide strong reasoning capabilities but are expensive to serve at scale, whereas small language models (SLMs) are cheaper but less reliable on difficult problems. We introduce PyroDash, a cost-aware framework for token-level SLM-LLM collaborative inference.

docs.title: The Blessing of Dimensionality: How Near-Orthogonality in High-Dimensional Spaces Explains Temporal Portability
docs.text:
• 作者：Abigail Woodring, Adrian Chan, Rana Muhammad Shahroz Khan, Sukwon Yun, Chau-Wai Wong 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.20301v1

Fine-tuning has been widely used to adapt large language models (LLMs) for domain-specific tasks. Parameter efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods such as low-rank adaptation (LoRA) are frequently used to reduce computational costs.

docs.title: Sound Probabilistic Safety Bounds for Large Language Models
docs.text:
• 作者：Mahdi Nazeri, Anne-Kathrin Schmuck, Sadegh Soudjani, Alessandro Abate
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.20286v1

We propose a novel framework for computing rigorous bounds on the probability that a large language model (LLM) generates harmful output to a given prompt. We study a new application of the Clopper-Pearson confidence intervals to obtain probably approximately correct (PAC) bounds for this problem.

docs.title: Which Values Do LLMs Confuse? A Schwartz-Based Recognition Study
docs.text:
• 作者：Andrei Chetvergov, Stepan Ukolov, Timofei Sivoraksha, Alexander Evseev, Mikhail Solovev 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.20270v1

Large language models are increasingly evaluated through the values they endorse, but such evaluations presuppose that models can identify the value expressed in a concrete situation. We study this prerequisite as controlled top-1 recognition over Schwartz's ten basic values.

docs.title: PoTRE: Test-Time Reasoning inspired by Cognitive Heterogeneity
docs.text:
• 作者：Anmol Kankariya, Sercan Ö. Arık
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.20268v1

While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at many tasks, they frequently struggle with complex reasoning that requires long-horizon planning and iterative error correction. Furthermore, standard single-stream prompting proves brittle when models encounter novel abstractions or rigorous domain constraints.

docs.title: The Ethics of Autonomous AI Agents for Offensive Security
docs.text:
• 作者：Andreas Happe, Jürgen Cito, Jasmin Wachter
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CR · arXiv:2607.20255v1

LLM-driven autonomous agents are reshaping offensive security. Unlike traditional penetration-testing tooling -- deterministic, narrowly scoped, and operated by trained practitioners -- agentic security tools exhibit \textit{indeterminacy} along three independent dimensions.

docs.title: On the Systematic Challenges of Culturally Loaded Machine Translation: Dream of the Red Chamber as the Cultural Lens
docs.text:
• 作者：Yiming Wang, Jiayuan Di
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.20241v1

Culturally loaded translation poses unique challenges for machine translation (MT), as meanings are deeply embedded in socio-cultural contexts beyond surface linguistic forms.

docs.title: HalluTruthQA: A Fine-Grained Benchmark for Hallucination Detection, Localization, and Explanation in Arabic Question Answering
docs.text:
• 作者：Abdessalam Bouchekif, Mohammed-En-Nadhir Zighem, Salah Eddine Bekhouche, Hichem Telli, Somaya Eltanbouly 等 12 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.20219v1

Large language models (LLMs) can generate fluent Arabic answers, yet factual errors remain difficult to detect, localize, explain, and verify. Existing hallucination benchmarks often provide response-level labels, with limited support for identifying the exact erroneous content, explaining why it is incorrect, or selec…

docs.title: Small, Free, and Effective: Orchestrating Open-Weight Small Language Models to Outperform Single LLM for Malware Analysis
docs.text:
• 作者：Adel ElZemity, Shujun Li, Budi Arief
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CR · arXiv:2607.20216v1

Malware analysis demands rapid interpretation of complex detonation reports spanning filesystem, network, and process behaviours. While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive capabilities for technical artifact interpretation, the opacity and escalating API costs of closed-weight frontier models motivate e…

docs.title: surprisal is Not a Theory
docs.text:
• 作者：Andrés Buxó-Lugo, Aniello De Santo, Morgan Grobol, Ryan J. Hubbard, Cassandra L. Jacobs
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.20208v1

Surprisal Theory is often characterized as a computational-level explanation per (Marr, 1982). We argue in this work that, even though a computational level narrative has been used to support "representation-agnostic research" within computational psycholinguistics, the movement toward black box systems embodied by lar…

docs.title: 具身智能
Closing the Lab-to-Store Gap: A Data-Efficient Post-Training and Experience-Driven Learning VLA Framework for Retail Humanoids
docs.text:
• 作者：Roger Sala Sisó, Tiago Silvério, Jakob Sand, Tran Nguyen Le
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.20345v1

Closing the gap between benchmark performance and reliable real-world operation remains a central challenge for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) humanoid robots, which must handle execution errors, distribution shifts, and environmental variability.

docs.title: SeededGrasp: Language-Guided Grasping in Complex Scenes with Multiple Embodiments
docs.text:
• 作者：Yang Xu, Gurpreet Singh Mukker, Raymond Wang, Jasper Gerigk, Maria Attarian 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.20207v1

Practical robotic grasping in complex scenes requires both 3D spatial reasoning and alignment with task-specific requirements. Vision-language models (VLMs) offer a natural way to specify these requirements using language, but existing approaches either use a VLM to predict the grasp directly with limited spatial aware…

docs.title: ReferTrack: Referring Then Tracking for Embodied Visual Tracking
docs.text:
• 作者：Hanjing Ye, Tianle Zeng, Jiazhao Zhang, Shaoan Wang, Zibo Zhang 等 9 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.20061v1

Embodied visual tracking (EVT) requires a mobile agent to continuously follow a specific target described in natural language using only onboard vision. While recent vision-language-action (VLA) policies unify target identification and trajectory planning, their chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning often operates in abstra…

docs.title: Robots Acquire Manipulation Skills in Seconds from a Single Human Video
docs.text:
• 作者：Guangyan Chen, Meiling Wang, Te Cui, Zichen Zhou, Qi Shao 等 12 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.20033v1

The ability to acquire skills rapidly and effortlessly while retaining those already mastered is essential for robots. However, current methods still rely on a cumbersome training-time loop that is costly and slow, while eroding skills already mastered.

docs.title: EA-Nav: Learning Safe Visual Navigation Policies with Embodiment Awareness
docs.text:
• 作者：Jialu Zhang, Yong Du, Xianda Guo, Shunwang Sun, Xinqi Liu 等 9 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19880v1

Cross-embodiment navigation is a key challenge in embodied intelligence. Due to differences in embodiment, the same visual observation may imply different actions for different agents, making prediction ambiguous when relying solely on vision.

docs.title: KineBench: Benchmarking Embodied World Models via IDM-Free Kinematic Grounding
docs.text:
• 作者：Zeyu Liu, Zhangzhe Zhu, Yang Zhang, Chenyou Fan, Chenjia Bai 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19876v1

Evaluating the physical consistency of embodied world models(EWMs) is a critical open challenge. While closed-loop evaluation via simulator rollouts offers a more faithful assessment of physical plausibility than open-loop alternatives, existing frameworks almost exclusively rely on Inverse Dynamics Models(IDMs) for ac…

docs.title: Clinical Pathways as Safety Specifications for Physical AI in Hospital Wards
docs.text:
• 作者：Gabriele Franchini, Giulio Mallardi, Michele De Carolis, Filippo Lanubile
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19827v1

Ensuring safety in Physical AI systems operating in real-world environments is a critical challenge, particularly in hospital wards where vulnerable patients, clinical staff, medical devices, and assistive robots coexist.

docs.title: EgoRecovery: Acquiring Failure Recovery Ability Through Human Recovery Demonstration
docs.text:
• 作者：Zuhao Ge, Yuchen Zhou, Weitao Zhou, Minglei Li, Xinyu Li 等 11 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19745v1

Robust embodied robots should be able to recover from failures and retry tasks in order to operate reliably in unstructured and noisy real-world environments. Achieving this capability requires training policies on data that captures recovery behaviors.

docs.title: NavVerse: Benchmarking Indoor-to-Outdoor Embodied Navigation in Continuous Robot Simulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Junzhe Wu, Yue Hu, Zeyu Han, Po-Hsun Chang, Yinan Dong 等 7 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19695v1

Robots deployed in delivery, campus, and emergency-response settings often need to navigate from buildings to streets within a single continuous episode. Existing benchmarks usually evaluate indoor and outdoor navigation separately, and many abstract away robot execution, leaving exit finding, boundary traversal, adapt…

docs.title: LENS: LLM-guided Environment Simplification for Planning and Control in Clutter
docs.text:
• 作者：Aileen Liao, Rachel Holladay, Dinesh Jayaraman, Michael Posa
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19633v1

Despite recent advances in general-purpose robotic manipulation, real-world multi-object clutter remains challenging to handle for today's prevalent approaches. The problem scales in complexity due to more objects and collisions, more unpredictable contact physics, distractors, and task ambiguity.

docs.title: ModPack: An Extensible Teleoperation Interface for Bimanual Mobile Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Joshua Citron, Renee Zbizika, Zeyi Liu, Shuran Song
  • 提交：2026-07-21 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19479v1

Existing teleoperation systems are often tailored to specific robot hardware and task domains, limiting their scalability and adaptability. We present ModPack, a modular and extensible teleoperation system designed to support diverse robot embodiments and task requirements within a unified framework.

docs.title: Masked Visual Actions for Unified World Modeling
docs.text:
• 作者：Hadi Alzayer, Wenlong Huang, Haonan Chen, Christopher Luey, Lvmin Zhang 等 11 人
  • 提交：2026-07-21 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.19343v1

Video models absorb rich priors over how the visual world moves, interacts, and responds to contact, making them promising substrates for robotic world modeling. The central challenge is how to communicate action to such models in a form aligned with the visual space in which they learned these interaction priors, yet…

Cardiac MRI Through-Plane Super-Resolution Guided by Reference and Memory

Clinical cardiac MRI is commonly acquired with high in-plane resolution but coarse through-plane resolution to reduce scan time and accommodate breath-hold and cardiac-motion constraints, which limits 3D analysis and diagnostic accuracy.

docs.title: PhyMRI-SR: Toward Physics-Aware MRI Image Super-Resolution
docs.text:

docs.title: Format-Controlled Multi-Scale JPEG Compression Response Analysis for Image-Level Forgery Screening
docs.text:

  • 提交：2026-07-07 · 分类 eess.IV · arXiv:2607.06615v1

Image forgery detection is a critical task in digital forensics, yet many deep-learning localization approaches are typically GPU-accelerated and computationally heavier than handcrafted screening methods.

docs.title: Realistic Compound-Lens Defocus Blur Synthesis
docs.text:
• 作者：Yunkyu Lee, Woohyeok Kim, Sunghyun Cho
  • 提交：2026-07-07 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.05837v1

Defocus blur degrades fine image structures and limits visual perception, which can adversely affect downstream vision tasks. Although recent deep learning deblurring methods have achieved strong performance, their effectiveness depends on training data and often degrades across cameras and lenses due to limited optica…

docs.title: Optimized Adaptive Loop Filter in Versatile Video Coding
docs.text:
• 作者：Xuewei Meng, Jiaqi Zhang, Chuanmin Jia, Xinfeng Zhang, Shanshe Wang 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-07 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.05737v2

In the Versatile Video Coding~(VVC) standard, adaptive loop filter~(ALF), including Geometry transformation-based Adaptive Loop Filter~(GALF) and Cross Component Adaptive Loop Filter~(CCALF), plays an essential role in reducing compression artifacts.

docs.title: 大语言模型
Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning
docs.text:
• 作者：Chen Tang, Yizhou Wang, Jianyu Wu, Lintao Wang, Shixiang Tang 等 29 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.07708v1

Structure-property relationships are foundational to biology, chemistry and materials science, where function, reactivity and physical response emerge from spatial, chemical and periodic organization.

docs.title: Co-LMLM: Continuous-Query Limited Memory Language Models
docs.text:
• 作者：Yair Feldman, Linxi Zhao, Nathan Godey, Dongyoung Go, Yilun Hua 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.07707v1

Limited memory language models (LMLMs) externalize factual knowledge during pretraining to a knowledge base (KB), rather than memorizing it in their weights. During generation, the model then fetches knowledge from the KB as needed.

docs.title: From Noisy Traces to Root Causes: Structural Trajectory Analysis and Causal Extraction for Agent Optimization
docs.text:
• 作者：Ying Chang, Jiahang Xu, Xuan Feng, Chenyuan Yang, Peng Cheng 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.07702v1

The optimization of long-horizon agents increasingly relies on reflection-based mechanisms, where a large language model (LLM) acts as an optimizer to diagnose agent failures and improve agent policies.

docs.title: Breaking Database Lock-in: Agentic Regeneration of High Performance Storage Readers for Database Bypass
docs.text:
• 作者：Victor Giannakouris, Immanuel Trummer
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.DB · arXiv:2607.07696v1

Analytical workloads operating on data stored in external database systems face a fundamental bottleneck: data access is guarded entirely by the database driver, like JDBC or ODBC, forcing all reads through query execution and other driver layers that are not designed for bulk columnar analytics.

docs.title: SkillCenter: A Large-Scale Source-Grounded Skill Library for Autonomous AI Agents
docs.text:
• 作者：Tianming Sha, Yue Zhao, Lichao Sun, Yushun Dong
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.07676v1

Autonomous AI agents can execute complex tasks with limited human review, yet they often lack the grounded operational knowledge to make their outputs not just executable but correct, secure, and maintainable.

docs.title: MedPMC: A Systematic Framework for Scaling High-Fidelity Medical Multimodal Data for Foundation Models
docs.text:
• 作者：Hyunjae Kim, Dain Kim, Pan Xiao, Serina S. Applebaum, Younjoon Chung 等 28 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.07673v1

Medicine is inherently multimodal, requiring clinicians to synthesize information across diverse data streams. Yet the development of multimodal foundation models is constrained by limited access to large-scale, high-quality clinical data.

docs.title: Does Bielik Know What It Doesn't Know? Activation Dispersion Separates Entity Familiarity from Factual Reliability Across Model Scale
docs.text:
• 作者：Grzegorz Brzezinka
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.07670v1

Large language models hallucinate most about entities they have never seen. We ask whether a model's activations betray entity familiarity before a single answer token is generated, and whether that signal predicts the factual reliability of the answers.

docs.title: DiaLLM: An Investigation into the Robustness-Generation Gap in English Dialect Adaptation
docs.text:
• 作者：Jordan Painter, Dipankar Srirag, Adarsh Kappiyath, Diptesh Kanojia, Aditya Joshi 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.07669v1

Large language models increasingly \emph{understand} dialectal English, yet still \emph{produce} only standard, US-leaning English, leaving dialectal generation, the harder half of the problem, largely unaddressed.

docs.title: Future Confidence Distillation in Large Language Models
docs.text:
• 作者：Sahil Kale
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.07626v1

Reliable confidence estimation is essential for deploying large language models (LLMs) in confidence-aware systems, where downstream decisions such as retrieval, tool use, and adaptive computation depend on accurately estimating answer reliability.

docs.title: CARLA-GS: Decoupling Representation, Reasoning, and Physics Simulation for Autonomous Driving Corner-Case Synthesis
docs.text:
• 作者：Kaicong Huang, Meng Ma, Ruimin Ke
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07601v1

Safety evaluation for autonomous driving is dominated by rare, safety-critical interactions, motivating simulators that can deliberately synthesize corner cases with photorealistic observations.

docs.title: Think Big, Search Small: Where Capacity Matters in Hierarchical Search Agents?
docs.text:
• 作者：Qinnan Cai, Yibo Zhao, Xiang Li
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.07548v1

Large language model based search agents increasingly adopt multi-agent architectures in which a main agent decomposes a complex question into sub-queries and dispatches them to parallel sub-agents.

docs.title: A Unified Detection Framework for AI-Related Content and Artifacts
docs.text:
• 作者：Xifeng Zhang, Tao Hu, Yijie Peng, Wan Tian
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 stat.ML · arXiv:2607.07527v1

Artificial intelligence (AI) is a double-edged sword: while it has achieved remarkable success across a wide range of domains, its deployment also calls for effective oversight and regulation, for which the detection of AI-related content and artifacts is perhaps the most direct and cost-effective approach.

docs.title: 具身智能
Dual Latent Memory in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Hongyu Qu, Jianzhe Gao, Xiaobin Hu, Shaohuan Yang, Xinlei Yu 等 9 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07608v1

Mainstream Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predict actions primarily from the current observation under a Markovian assumption, thus struggling with long-horizon, temporally dependent tasks.

docs.title: Smooth Operator: A Real-Time Sampling-Based Algorithm for Kinematic Hand Retargeting
docs.text:
• 作者：Robert Jomar Malate, Erik Bauer, Norica Bacuieti, Stefanos Charalambous, Elvis Nava 等 7 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07491v1

Advances in learning-based robotic manipulation, such as Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models and Video Action Models (VAMs), heavily rely on high-quality teleoperation data. Their capabilities are strictly upper-bounded by the quality of the underlying human demonstrations.

docs.title: EmbodiedGen V2: An Agentic, Simulation-Ready 3D World Engine for Embodied AI
docs.text:
• 作者：Xinjie Wang, Liu Liu, Taojun Ding, Andrew Choi, Chaodong Huang 等 12 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07459v1

We present EmbodiedGen V2, a generative 3D world engine for building executable sim-ready environments for embodied intelligence. Sim-ready 3D asset generation has advanced rapidly, yet assembling such assets into policy-ready task environments remains largely manual, limiting scalable closed-loop learning.

docs.title: Multi-Agent Robotic Control with Onboard Vision-Language Models
docs.text:
• 作者：Kajetan Rachwał, Maciej Majek, Bartłomiej Boczek, Jakub Matejczyk, Dominik Matejkowski 等 9 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.MA · arXiv:2607.07403v1

Vision Language Models (VLMs) and Vision Language Action (VLA) models have shown promise in robotic control. Yet, they face significant challenges regarding explainability, generalization, and compute requirements.

docs.title: Behavior Foundations for Quadruped Robots: ABot-C0 Technical Report
docs.text:
• 作者：Xufeng Zhao, Fuzhi Yang, Jianhui Chen, Li Gao, Zhang Meng 等 18 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07370v1

In embodied intelligence systems, the motion controller serves as the critical bridge between semantic reasoning and physical execution. Humanoid control has progressed rapidly through large-scale human motion-capture data and motion-tracking paradigm.

docs.title: TouchWorld: A Predictive and Reactive Tactile Foundation Model for Dexterous Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Jianyi Zhou, Feiyang Hong, Yunhao Li, Yicheng Zhao, Yongjue Cen 等 12 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07287v1

Dexterous manipulation in everyday environments requires both anticipation and reaction: a robot must predict how contact should evolve while rapidly correcting local errors caused by slip, misalignment, unstable grasping, or force mismatch.

docs.title: Validate the Dream Before You Trust Its Verdict: Admissibility for World-Model Simulators
docs.text:
• 作者：Christian Oefinger, Finn Rasmus Schäfer, Korbinian Moller, Mattia Piccinini, Johannes Betz
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07196v1

Across robotics, World Models (WMs) are increasingly used to evaluate action policies by simulating the consequences of actions in an imagined world, and returning a success or safety verdict. Yet a verdict is only as trustworthy as the WM that produced it, and the WM itself needs to be certified.

docs.title: GeoProp: Grounding Robot State in Vision for Generalist Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Guoyang Zhao, Quanhao Qian, Gongjie Zhang, Wenhao Li, Jiuniu Wang 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07101v1

Proprioception is fundamental to robotic manipulation, yet standard fusion methods often treat it as an isolated vector lacking explicit alignment with visual tokens.

docs.title: GemNav: Discrete-Token Visual Robot Navigation using a Multimodal Large Language Model
docs.text:
• 作者：Peter Bohm, Saimunur Rahman, Abdelwahed Khamis, Sagun Man Singh Shrestha, Chris McCool 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.06882v1

Visual navigation policies built on large pretrained models have so far followed a common recipe: a dedicated visual encoder, a bespoke action head, and training on thousands of hours of cross-embodiment datasets. We ask whether this recipe is necessary.

docs.title: Vision Language Action (VLA) Models for Unmanned Aerial Robotics and Bimanual Manipulation: A Review
docs.text:
• 作者：Inkyu Sa, Chanoh Park, Hea-Min Lee, Donghee Noh, Ho Seok Ahn
  • 提交：2026-07-07 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.06706v1

Vision Language Action (VLA) models unify visual perception, natural-language understanding, and action generation within a single foundation model, allowing a robot to follow instructions such as fold the towel or fly to the red building directly from camera images.

docs.title: SPEAR: A Simulator for Photorealistic Embodied AI Research
docs.text:
• 作者：Mike Roberts, Renhan Wang, Rushikesh Zawar, Rachith Dey-Prakash, Quentin Leboutet 等 13 人
  • 提交：2026-07-07 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.06701v1

Interactive simulators have become powerful tools for training embodied agents and generating synthetic visual data, but existing photorealistic simulators suffer from limited generality, programmability, and rendering speed.

docs.title: NativeMEM: Native Memory Compression for Long-Horizon Robotic Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Ziye Wang, Modi Shi, Chaojun Ni, Jiazhi Yang, Mengdi Li 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-07 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.06678v1

How can pretrained Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models retain long-horizon visual histories with high-frequency updates without sacrificing efficiency? Existing approaches rely on external memory management, which restrains either the memory horizon or the reactiveness of pretrained policies.

本期共收录 29 篇。

docs.text:
• 作者：Shaoming Pan, Chenchuhui Hu, Leon Axel, Meng Ye
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.07581v1

Clinical cardiac MRI is commonly acquired with high in-plane resolution but coarse through-plane resolution to reduce scan time and accommodate breath-hold and cardiac-motion constraints, which limits 3D analysis and diagnostic accuracy.

docs.text:
• 作者：Yifan Zhou, Qihao Yang, Yan Li, Donggang Li, Xiru Hu 等 17 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.08758v1

Scientific ideas rarely start from a blank page. They inherit mechanisms, repair known limitations, and recombine pieces of earlier work, much like biological genomes. Current benchmarks still say little about whether AI systems can follow this inheritance structure.

docs.text:

  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.08754v1

Low-rank factorization is widely used to compress neural networks, but modern models are often not naturally amenable to aggressive factorization without significant accuracy loss.

docs.text:
• 作者：Siddharth Damodharan, Radhika Gupta, Ali Alshami, Ryan Rabinowitz, Jugal Kalita
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.08745v1

Recent advances in Vision-Language Models, Large Language Models, and Multimodal Large Language Models have improved autonomous driving tasks such as scene understanding, decision making, trajectory prediction, and visual question answering.

docs.title: Workflow as Knowledge: Semantic Persistence for LLM-Mediated Workflows
docs.text:
• 作者：Emanuele Quinto, Carlo Andrea Rozzi, Francesco Zanitti
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.08740v1

Large language model (LLM) applications increasingly use explicit workflows for tool use, retrieval, branching, checkpointing, and human approval. Existing workflow systems already address many execution concerns.

docs.title: The Illusion of Equivalency: Statistical Characterization of Quantization Effects in LLMs
docs.text:
• 作者：Baha Rababah, Cuneyt Gurcan Akcora, Carson K. Leung
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.08734v1

Post-training quantization is widely used to deploy large language models in resource-constrained settings, yet its evaluation relies almost exclusively on accuracy and perplexity. We show that these metrics fail to capture behavioral changes induced by quantization.

docs.title: Super Weights in LLMs and the Failure of Selective Training
docs.text:
• 作者：Shreyas Subramanian, Adewale Akinfaderin, Akarsha Sehwag
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.08733v1

Recent work identified Super Weights, individual parameters whose removal degrades model performance by orders of magnitude. We show that this degradation due to pruning Super Weights does not universally apply to all LLMs.

docs.title: Validity of LLMs as data annotators: AMALIA on authority
docs.text:
• 作者：Manuel Pita
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.08731v1

A national language model offers a linguistic community its own instrument for measuring what its citizens say and value. Portugal's AMALIA, a publicly funded 9B-parameter model for European Portuguese, appears competitive on agreement alone: asked to code the moral foundation of authority, it agrees with trained human…

docs.title: Do You Need a Frontier Model as a Citation Verifier? Benchmarking Rubric LLMs for Deep-Research Source Attribution
docs.text:
• 作者：Ethan Leung, Elias Lumer, Corey Feld, Austin Huber, Vamse Kumar Subbiah 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.08700v1

Reinforcement learning increasingly relies on an LLM judge to score each rubric criterion, and that judge acts as the reward model during training. Before such a signal can be trusted, we need to know how capable the judge must be and how biased it is.

docs.title: A Practical Investigation of Training-free Relaxed Speculative Decoding
docs.text:
• 作者：Guoxuan Xia, Luka Ribar, Paul Balanca
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.08690v1

Speculative decoding accelerates sampling from an autoregressive LLM by using a faster auxiliary model to draft tokens which are then verified in parallel by the LLM. Standard speculative decoding is lossless: its rejection and resampling steps exactly preserve the LLM's sampling distribution.

docs.text:

  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.08681v1

As agentic AI systems are increasingly applied to cyber-physical environments, their evaluation requires assessment of both task performance and trustworthiness. In decentralized energy markets, autonomous agents may improve market utility, but may also exploit invalid physical data, create artificial liquidity, and pr…

docs.title: 具身智能
DexVerse: A Modular Benchmark for Multi-Task, Multi-Embodiment Dexterous Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Yunchao Yao, Zhuxiu Xu, Tianqi Zhang, Zixian Liu, Sikai Li 等 15 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.08751v1

Building general-purpose dexterous manipulation policies requires benchmarks that go beyond isolated tasks to systematically evaluate policies across diverse interaction modes, sensory conditions, and robot embodiments.

docs.title: Native Video-Action Pretraining for Generalizable Robot Control
docs.text:
• 作者：Qihang Zhang, Lin Li, Luyao Zhang, Shuai Yang, Yiming Luo 等 29 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.08639v1

The advent of video-action models offers a promising path for robot control. Nevertheless, we argue that repurposing video generative models designed for digital content creation is inherently inadequate for physical environments.

docs.title: FabriVLA: A Lightweight Vision-Language-Action Model for Precise Multi-Task Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Shiyuan Yang, Borong Zhang, Jizheng Zhang, Zhijia Tao, Junfei Guo 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.08575v1

We present FabriVLA, a lightweight Vision-Language-Action model for Precise Multi-Task Manipulation. FabriVLA combines an InternVL3.5 vision-language backbone with a flow-matching action head featuring gated self-attention across action tokens and shallow VLM layer fusion for enriched spatial context.

docs.title: Early to Share, Late to Save: Synchronisation-Driven Communication Gating in Bandwidth-Constrained Cooperative VLN
docs.text:
• 作者：Arav Gupta, Nivedan Yakolli, Avinash Gautam
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.MA · arXiv:2607.08504v1

Most cooperative Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) methods assume unlimited communication, not considering real-world applications where bandwidth is restricted and information efficiency is critical.

docs.title: Harness VLA: Steering Frozen VLAs into Reliable Manipulation Primitives via Memory-Guided Agents
docs.text:
• 作者：Yixian Zhang, Huanming Zhang, Feng Gao, Xiao Li, Zhihao Liu 等 16 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.08448v1

Language-conditioned manipulation requires both precise contact-rich control and robust reasoning over language, scenes, and long horizons. End-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide strong local visuomotor skills, but they are trained on in-distribution task trajectories and often fail under deployment per…

docs.title: WCog-VLA: A Dual-Level World-Cognitive Vision-Language-Action Model for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
docs.text:
• 作者：Xuerun Yan, Zhexi Lian, Nuoheng Zhang, Shiyu Fang, Haoran Wang 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.08375v1

Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have advanced end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing methods either lack comprehensive world cognition or suffer from fragmented world foresight, inherently confining these models to reactive driving.

docs.title: TFP: Temporally Conditioned Memory-Fusion Policies for Visuomotor Learning
docs.text:
• 作者：Yushen Liang, Yue Peng, Baosheng Jin, Tianluo Zhang, Xinyu Zhang 等 9 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.08283v1

Vision--Language--Action (VLA) policies such as $π_{0.5}$ and OpenVLA perform well on many manipulation tasks, but they are often reactive: the next action is predicted from the current observation, instruction, and proprioceptive state.

docs.title: LEEVLA: Seeing What Matters in Latent Environment Evolution for Vision-Language-Action
docs.text:
• 作者：Qi Lyu, Baicheng Liu, Xudong Wang, Jiahua Dong, Lianqing Liu 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.08182v1

Vision-language-action (VLA) models aim to map multimodal inputs to robot actions. However, most existing approaches struggle to cover complex dynamic scenarios due to treating all visual tokens uniformly and reasoning with human-selected factors, which lack mechanisms to emphasize task-critical evidence and ignore und…

docs.title: Post-Training in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
docs.text:
• 作者：Ruining Yang, Muxing Wang, Yixiao Chen, Tongfei Guo, Yi Xu 等 11 人
  • 提交：2026-07-09 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.08072v1

End-to-end models that map multimodal inputs directly to future trajectories/maneuvers have emerged as an increasingly prominent research paradigm in autonomous driving. This class of models includes both Vision-Language-Action models and trajectory-generative planners.

docs.title: In vivo feasibility study of humanoid robots in surgery
docs.text:
• 作者：Zekai Liang, Nikita Thareja, Peihan Zhang, Calvin Joyce, Soofiyan Atar 等 10 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07972v1

Recent advances in actuation, control and learning have rapidly pushed humanoid robots from a distant vision towards near-term real-world deployment. Healthcare is a particularly pressing domain, in which staffing shortages and increasing care demand are widening the gap between clinical workload and available skilled…

docs.title: Dual Latent Memory in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Hongyu Qu, Jianzhe Gao, Xiaobin Hu, Shaohuan Yang, Xinlei Yu 等 9 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07608v1

Mainstream Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predict actions primarily from the current observation under a Markovian assumption, thus struggling with long-horizon, temporally dependent tasks.

docs.title: Smooth Operator: A Real-Time Sampling-Based Algorithm for Kinematic Hand Retargeting
docs.text:
• 作者：Robert Jomar Malate, Erik Bauer, Norica Bacuieti, Stefanos Charalambous, Elvis Nava 等 7 人
  • 提交：2026-07-08 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.07491v1

Advances in learning-based robotic manipulation, such as Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models and Video Action Models (VAMs), heavily rely on high-quality teleoperation data. Their capabilities are strictly upper-bounded by the quality of the underlying human demonstrations.

本期共收录 25 篇。

Backbone-Agnostic Perturbation-Induced Uncertainty Learning for End-to-End Real-World Image Dehazing
docs.text:
• 作者：Bingcai Wei
  • 提交：2026-07-13 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.11623v1

Real-world paired image dehazing remains challenging because haze degradation is spatially non-uniform, illumination-dependent, and physically ambiguous even when haze-free references are available.

docs.title: CUST: Clustered Unit-level Similarity Transformer for Lightweight Image Super-Resolution
docs.text:
• 作者：Jeongsoo Kim
  • 提交：2026-07-13 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.11088v1

Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT)-based models have exhibited remarkable performance in image super-resolution. However, the quadratic computational complexity of ViTs with respect to spatial resolution severely constrains their efficiency, leading to high latency and massive memory consumption.

docs.title: DDR-Net: Haze-Aware Dual-Domain Refinement for Single-Image Dehazing
docs.text:

  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.14739v1

Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have achieved impressive results in visuomotor policy learning, yet remain fundamentally reactive, mapping current observations and language to actions without explicit forward prediction of world dynamics.

docs.text:

Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for general-purpose robot manipulation; however, their transition to real-world environments reveals vulnerabilities to minor environmental perturbations.

docs.text:
• 作者：Yuanchun Guo, Bingyan Liu
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.14695v1

Flow matching Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models promise precise continuous control, but their iterative denoising nature introduces fundamental incompatibilities with real-time robotics: global timestep injection invalidates KV-caching, forcing a choice between slow $O(N^2)$ re-computation or mathematically incorrect…

docs.title: NavCMPO: Critic-Guided MeanFlow Policy Optimization for Adaptive Navigation
docs.text:
• 作者：Junjie An, Yi Wu, Xiao Liu, Yiqun Zhou, Yuechen Wu 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.14643v1

End-to-end diffusion-based policies have demonstrated strong performance in mapless visual navigation, but their iterative denoising process introduces substantial inference latency, while behavior cloning limits performance to the quality of expert demonstrations.

docs.title: Action QFormer: Structured Representation Shaping under Action Supervision in Vision-Language-Action Models
docs.text:
• 作者：Yufeng Ji, Wenhao Tang, Haoyi Niu, Koushil Sreenath, Yi Wu 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.14635v1

Action supervision in vision-language-action (VLA) models is often treated as a downstream objective for learning action prediction. In this paper, we study it instead as a force that shapes inherited multimodal representations.

docs.title: Knowing You at First Glance: Inferring Apparent Personality from Faces
docs.text:
• 作者：Shuhuan Chen, Xiangyu Zhu, Weisong Zhao, Haichao Shi, Xiao-Yu Zhang 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.14631v1

Inferring apparent personality from facial images is important in social scenarios for embodied agents in human-robot interaction. Unlike inferring intrinsic personality traits via conversation, this task models first-impression personality perception based solely on facial appearance before interaction begins.

本期共收录 29 篇。

QuReC: All-in-One Image Restoration with Query-Specific Guidance and Local-Global Response Calibration
docs.text:
• 作者：Shen Zhou, Jinghui Zhang, Wenbo Huang, Xuwei Qian, Zhen Wu 等 10 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.15097v1

All-in-one image restoration aims to recover clean images degraded by multiple corruption types using a single unified model. Existing methods typically rely on image-level prompts or shared guidance to handle diverse degradations.

docs.title: Domain Adaptation of Mismatched Proximal Denoiser for Plug-and-Play Image Reconstruction
docs.text:
• 作者：Guixian Xu, Jinglai Li, Junqi Tang
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 eess.IV · arXiv:2607.14894v1

Plug-and-play proximal gradient descent (PnP-PGD) enables flexible image reconstruction by using denoisers as implicit priors. In practice, these denoisers are often deployed outside their training domains.

docs.title: 大语言模型
Partition, Prompt, Aggregate: Statistical Self-Consistency in Language Models
docs.text:
• 作者：Patrik Wolf, Thomas Kleine Buening, Andreas Krause, Celestine Mendler-Dünner
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.15277v1

In-context learning is commonly interpreted as a form of conditional inference, in which the prompt specifies a context and the model's output is treated as an estimate of the corresponding conditional distribution. If this interpretation holds, then LLM estimates should satisfy basic probabilistic identities.

docs.title: SearchOS-V1: Towards Robust Open-Domain Information-Seeking Agent Collaboration
docs.text:
• 作者：Yuyao Zhang, Junjie Gao, Zhengxian Wu, Jiaming Fan, Jin Zhang 等 14 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.15257v1

Recent advances in Tool-Integrated Large Language Models have made web search a core capability of information-seeking agents. However, as interaction histories grow, agents increasingly struggle to track task progress.

docs.title: teLLMe Why (Ain't Nothing but a Jam): Exploratory Causal Analysis of Urban Driving Data
docs.text:
• 作者：Qiwei Li, Jorge Ortiz
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.15254v1

Traffic agencies now have access to large volumes of video-derived data for studying safety and congestion. Most of these data are observational and collected without interventions, which makes causal questions such as "How would rain change traffic density?" difficult to answer.

docs.title: When Words Are Safe But Actions Kill: Probing Physical Danger Beyond Text Safety in Hidden-State Risk Space
docs.text:
• 作者：Weimeng Wang, Ziqiang Wang, Zihang Zhan, Chuanpu Fu, Qi Li 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.15218v1

Large language models (LLMs) increasingly serve as high-level planners for embodied agents, where linguistically benign instructions can become unsafe once grounded in the physical world. We study whether this physically grounded danger is the same safety problem as ordinary text-level content danger.

docs.title: Symbal: Detecting Systematic Misalignments in Model-Generated Captions
docs.text:
• 作者：Maya Varma, Jean-Benoit Delbrouck, Sophie Ostmeier, Akshay Chaudhari, Curtis Langlotz
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.15216v1

Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often introduce errors when generating image captions, resulting in misaligned image-text pairs. Our work focuses on a class of captioning errors that we refer to as systematic misalignments, where a recurring error in MLLM-generated captions is closely associated with the prese…

docs.title: MM-IssueLoc: A Controlled Benchmark for Evaluating Visual Evidence in Multimodal Repository-Level Issue Localization
docs.text:
• 作者：Shaoxiong Zhan, Shi Hu, Boyu Feng, Hai Lin, Andrew Gong 等 10 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.SE · arXiv:2607.15205v1

Real repository issues routinely include visual evidence such as screenshots, error dialogs, rendered UI states, and logs, yet repository-level issue localization is evaluated mostly as a text-only task.

docs.title: Self-Evolving Human-Centered Framework for Explainable Depression Symptom Annotation
docs.text:
• 作者：Hoang-Loc Cao, Van Pham, Truong Thanh Hung Nguyen, Phuc Truong Loc Nguyen, Phuc Ho 等 7 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.15202v1

Annotation quality is a major bottleneck in building reliable and explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) systems for mental health research. In depression-related datasets, labels are often assigned without structured evidence, symptom-level justification, or traceable alignment with the criteria of the Diagnostic a…

docs.title: Mask-Aware Policy Gradients for Diffusion Language Models
docs.text:
• 作者：Haran Raajesh, Kulin Shah, Adam Klivans, Philipp Krähenbühl
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.15200v1

Reinforcement learning has proven effective for improving reasoning in large language models, but extending it to Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) remains challenging due to the intractability of the log-likelihood estimation.

docs.title: Can We Trust Item Response Theory for AI Evaluation?
docs.text:
• 作者：Han Jiang, Sunbeom Kwon, Jinwen Luo, Ziang Xiao, Susu Zhang
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.15190v1

AI benchmarks increasingly leverage item-level statistical models, particularly item response theory (IRT), to estimate model capabilities, rank systems, select informative examples, and diagnose benchmark quality.

docs.title: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Scientific Visualization Literacy
docs.text:
• 作者：Patrick Phuoc Do, Chau M. Ta, Chaoli Wang
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.15176v1

Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to interpret visualizations, yet current evaluations remain largely chart-centric and provide limited evidence of understanding of scientific visualization (SciVis).

docs.title: On-Policy Delta Distillation
docs.text:
• 作者：Byeongho Heo, Jaehui Hwang, Sangdoo Yun, Dongyoon Han
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.15161v1

On-policy distillation is an alternative post-training method in reinforcement learning that alleviates the constraints imposed by reward models by providing token-level supervision from a teacher model.

docs.title: Grokipedia vs Wikipedia: An LLM-Based Audit of Political Neutrality along Ideologies
docs.text:
• 作者：Filippos Vlahos, Guillaume Bied, Tijl De Bie
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.15146v1

Online encyclopedias shape political opinion and, through it, democratic discourse. In late 2025, Grokipedia was released, an encyclopedia written entirely by the LLM Grok.

docs.title: 具身智能
RoboTTT: Context Scaling for Robot Policies
docs.text:
• 作者：Yunfan Jiang, Yevgen Chebotar, Ruijie Zheng, Fengyuan Hu, Yunhao Ge 等 11 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.15275v1

Recent robot foundation models operate with single-step or short-history visuomotor context. We introduce Test-Time-Training Robot Policies (RoboTTT), a robot model and training recipe that scale visuomotor context to 8K timesteps, three orders of magnitude beyond state-of-the-art policies, without growing inference la…

docs.title: BadWAM: When World-Action Models Dream Right but Act Wrong
docs.text:
• 作者：Qi Li, Xingyi Yang, Xinchao Wang
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.15207v1

World-action models (WAMs) are emerging as a promising foundation for embodied control: rather than predicting actions alone, they learn representations that couple action generation with future world prediction.

docs.title: Scaling Behavior Foundation Model for Humanoid Robots
docs.text:
• 作者：Weishuai Zeng, Kangning Yin, Xiaojie Niu, Shunlin Lu, Weixiang Zhong 等 18 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.15163v1

Humanoid control requires natural whole-body coordination, precise real-time responses to control signals, and robust generalization across diverse environmental contexts, making it a cornerstone for generalist embodied agents.

docs.title: CosFly-VLA: A Spatially Aware Vision-Language-Action Model for UAV Tracking
docs.text:
• 作者：Ruilong Ren, Songsheng Cheng, Yunpeng Zhou, Hanxuan Chen, Xiangyue Wang 等 12 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.15004v1

Dynamic target tracking is essential for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) operating in complex urban environments, where both the target and the camera viewpoint change continuously.

docs.title: AeroAct: Action-Centered World-Action Models for Language-Conditioned Quadrotor Flight
docs.text:
• 作者：Xinhong Zhang, Qiyuan Zhu, Yubo Huang, Haolin Chen, Runqing Wang 等 11 人
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.14997v1

Language-conditioned quadrotor flight requires a policy to ground semantic goals, anticipate the visual consequences of ego-motion, and output control references that remain smooth and dynamically executable under rapidly changing first-person views.

docs.title: Towards Human-like Physical Intelligence: LifelongVision-Language-Action Learning for Robotic Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Yao He, Gan Sun, Wenqi Liang, Fazeng Li, Yang Cong
  • 提交：2026-07-16 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.14852v1

Similar to the natural capabilities of humans to sequentially learn new tasks, robots with Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models should possess lifelong learning ability to learn a new task when deployed in open-world environments.

docs.title: 图像复原 / 低层视觉
Co-addition and Subtraction of Undersampled Images
docs.text:
• 作者：Matan Schlanger, Barak Zackay
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 astro-ph.IM · arXiv:2607.18054v1

In astronomical imaging surveys, repeated observations of the same sky patches are taken in order to obtain deeper images and detect new sources. This is the case in the search for many transient phenomena, such as supernovae, gravitational wave (GW) optical counterparts and other cataclysmic variables.

docs.title: Luminosity-Adaptive Contrast Enhancement Using CLAHE for Retinal Fundus Images with Quantitative Validation and Comparative Analysis
docs.text:
• 作者：K. Mithra, Prem Kumar Santhanam
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 eess.IV · arXiv:2607.17691v1

Background: Retinal fundus imaging is central to the early diagnosis of sight-threatening conditions including diabetic retinopathy, glaucoma, and retinal vein occlusion.

docs.title: Rarity-Aware Discrete Diffusion with Spatially Consistent Decoding for Photo-Realistic Image Super-Resolution
docs.text:
• 作者：Ao Li, Yapeng Du, Yi Xin, Lei Zhu, Le Zhang 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.17612v1

Continuous diffusion models have become the dominant paradigm for photo-realistic image Super-Resolution (SR), but they typically formulate reconstruction as continuous signal-level denoising and incorporate semantic priors through external conditioning modules.

docs.title: Does Super-Resolution Preserve Defect Evidence? A Low-False-Call Benchmark for Semiconductor Inspection
docs.text:
• 作者：Shaoliang Yang, Jun Wang
  • 提交：2026-07-19 · 分类 cs.CV · arXiv:2607.17401v1

Super-resolution can make inspection images appear sharper without preserving the evidence needed to detect a defect. We study this failure mode with a benchmark that separates reconstruction from detection and evaluates both at a predeclared low false-positive rate.

docs.title: 大语言模型
Automated Discovery Has No Universally Superior Harness
docs.text:
• 作者：Akshat Gupta, Jermaine Lei, Alexander Lu, Gopala Anumanchipalli, Leshem Choshen
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.18235v1

Autonomous discovery systems such as OpenEvolve and TTT-Discover are often used as general-purpose harnesses. However, in practice these are composite systems combining several design choices about archives, parent selection, exploration, and budget allocation into a single recipe.

docs.title: It's Not What You Say, It's How You Say It: Evaluating LLM Responses to Expressions of Belief
docs.text:
• 作者：Kevin Du, Clara Kümpel, Michelle Wastl, Alex Warstadt
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.18232v1

Users frequently express their beliefs to large language models (LLMs). In some situations, the LLM should accept these contextual beliefs as true. In others, they should stick to their prior knowledge.

docs.title: Vector Search As Nearest Neighbor Matching: RAG-based Policy Learning in Causal Inference
docs.text:
• 作者：Masahiro Kato, Taka Kato
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 econ.EM · arXiv:2607.18225v1

We propose one-step and two-step methods for policy learning with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We formulate RAG-based action selection under the potential outcome framework.

docs.title: PPL-Factory: Task-Aware and Budget-Aware Data Selection from Language Modeling to Reasoning
docs.text:
• 作者：Hang Zhang, Warren J. Gross
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.18199v1

Not all training samples contribute equally to large language model fine-tuning. Selecting informative training samples can reduce the computational cost while preserving downstream performance. Many existing data selection methods rely on indirect heuristics, such as data quality, diversity or reasoning trace length.

docs.title: VEHBench: A Stage-Local Diagnostic Benchmark for LLM-Assisted Vibration Energy Harvester Design
docs.text:
• 作者：Depeng Su, Yuyu Luo, Guobiao Hu
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.18181v1

Battery-free Internet of Things (IoT) requires iterative design of vibration energy harvesters (VEHs) under coupled physical constraints, while LLMs are emerging as interface layers for engineering workflows.

docs.title: FlashRT: Agent Harness for Guiding Agents to Deploy Real-Time Multimodal Applications
docs.text:
• 作者：Krish Agarwal, Zhuoming Chen, Yanyuan Qin, Zhenyu Gu, Atri Rudra 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.18171v1

Real-time multimodal applications, including voice agents and interactive video generation, compose heterogeneous models into pipelines whose efficient deployment requires application-specific decisions about placement, streaming, and intra-model parallelism.

docs.title: OR Else: A Differentiable Trust Region for Policy Optimization
docs.text:
• 作者：Chinmay Rane, Kanishka Tyagi, Michael Manry
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.18163v1

PPO and the GRPO baseline studied here use clipped surrogate objectives whose favorable-direction saturation introduces an abrupt change in the scalar objective's derivative. We ask whether Output Reset (OR), a smooth one-sided saturation rule, offers a useful alternative for large language model post-training.

docs.title: LLMs and Agentic AI Systems for Smart Grids: A Tutorial on Architectures and Applications
docs.text:
• 作者：Daniela Rojas, Abdulwahab Albassam, Aidan G. Leung, Jett Ngo, Ryan Luo 等 14 人
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 eess.SY · arXiv:2607.18147v1

Large language models (LLMs) and agentic AI systems have evolved from natural language tasks to using external tools to plan, retrieve, and act in technical domains.

docs.title: Do Language Models Dream of Binding Molecules? Benchmarking LLMs under Spatial Constraints
docs.text:
• 作者：Thomas MacDougall, Maksim Kuznetsov, Roman Schutski, Rim Shayakhmetov, Maxim Malkov 等 8 人
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.18144v1

Structure-based drug design (SBDD) leverages the 3D structure of protein targets, often complemented by other spatial constraints, to generate candidate binding molecules.

docs.title: SGA: Plug&Play Geometric Verification for Educational Video Synthesis
docs.text:
• 作者：Lopez Jhon, Hinojosa Carlos, Ghanem Bernard
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.AI · arXiv:2607.18116v1

Recent work leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate executable code for pedagogical animations using libraries such as Manim. However, ensuring spatial correctness and visual legibility remains challenging, as existing frameworks emphasize pedagogical content while overlooking geometric occlusions.

docs.title: How Does Alignment Tuning Shape Representations of Sycophancy and Related Cue-Induced Biases in LLMs?
docs.text:
• 作者：Prakhar Gupta, Terry Jingchen Zhang, Florent Draye, Bernhard Schölkopf, Zhijing Jin
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.CL · arXiv:2607.18114v1

Modern LLMs are alarmingly susceptible to surprisingly simple immaterial changes of input prompts: a casual hint, an incorrectly labeled few-shot example, or a fake prior assistant turn often flips an originally correct answer.

docs.title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks
docs.text:
• 作者：Tianzhu Ye, Li Dong, Guanheng Chen, He Zhu, Xun Wu 等 7 人
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.LG · arXiv:2607.18110v1

Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles.

docs.title: 具身智能
Patch Policy: Efficient Embodied Control via Dense Visual Representations
docs.text:
• 作者：Gaoyue Zhou, Zichen Jeff Cui, Ada Langford, Bowen Tan, Yann LeCun 等 6 人
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.18236v1

Pretrained dense visual features from Vision Transformers (ViTs) are powerful yet have been underutilized in robot learning. Modern robot policies either compress each observation into a single global token, or rely on visual backbones trained from scratch, sacrificing both fine-grained spatial detail and the benefits…

docs.title: FM-VLA: Force-based Memory for Vision-Language-Action Models in Contact-Rich Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Ruicheng Li, Qixiu Li, Ruichun Ma, Yu Deng, Lin Luo 等 11 人
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.18231v1

Vision-language-action (VLA) models have achieved impressive generalization in robotic manipulation, and recent memory-augmented VLAs have relaxed the Markovian assumption by conditioning on past images or language summaries.

docs.title: UniETP: Unifying Environments for Generalizable Embodied Task Planning
docs.text:
• 作者：Peiran Xu, Jiaqi Zheng, Ziyou Wang, Yadong Mu
  • 提交：2026-07-20 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.18062v1

This paper focuses on the problem of Embodied Task Planning, where an agent is required to execute a sequence of atomic actions within an interactive environment to complete a user-specified task.

docs.title: Closing the Loop in Humanoid VLA: Persistent 3D Object Tokens for Verifiable Loco-Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Peng Ren, Haoyang Ge, Jiang Zhao, Cong Huang, Yukun Shi 等 7 人

docs.text:
• 作者：Jialu Zhang, Yong Du, Xianda Guo, Shunwang Sun, Xinqi Liu 等 9 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19880v1

Cross-embodiment navigation is a key challenge in embodied intelligence. Due to differences in embodiment, the same visual observation may imply different actions for different agents, making prediction ambiguous when relying solely on vision.

docs.title: Clinical Pathways as Safety Specifications for Physical AI in Hospital Wards
docs.text:
• 作者：Gabriele Franchini, Giulio Mallardi, Michele De Carolis, Filippo Lanubile
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19827v1

Ensuring safety in Physical AI systems operating in real-world environments is a critical challenge, particularly in hospital wards where vulnerable patients, clinical staff, medical devices, and assistive robots coexist.

docs.title: EgoRecovery: Acquiring Failure Recovery Ability Through Human Recovery Demonstration
docs.text:
• 作者：Zuhao Ge, Yuchen Zhou, Weitao Zhou, Minglei Li, Xinyu Li 等 11 人
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19745v1

Robust embodied robots should be able to recover from failures and retry tasks in order to operate reliably in unstructured and noisy real-world environments. Achieving this capability requires training policies on data that captures recovery behaviors.

docs.title: LENS: LLM-guided Environment Simplification for Planning and Control in Clutter
docs.text:
• 作者：Aileen Liao, Rachel Holladay, Dinesh Jayaraman, Michael Posa
  • 提交：2026-07-22 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19633v1

Despite recent advances in general-purpose robotic manipulation, real-world multi-object clutter remains challenging to handle for today's prevalent approaches. The problem scales in complexity due to more objects and collisions, more unpredictable contact physics, distractors, and task ambiguity.

docs.title: ModPack: An Extensible Teleoperation Interface for Bimanual Mobile Manipulation
docs.text:
• 作者：Joshua Citron, Renee Zbizika, Zeyi Liu, Shuran Song
  • 提交：2026-07-21 · 分类 cs.RO · arXiv:2607.19479v1

Existing teleoperation systems are often tailored to specific robot hardware and task domains, limiting their scalability and adaptability. We present ModPack, a modular and extensible teleoperation system designed to support diverse robot embodiments and task requirements within a unified framework.
